title: Ability to move files between files columns
excerpt:
HI All, we really need a way to move items between file columns in monday.com 
for details please see here: Move files between columns 
similar requests here:  Ability to move files 
Thank you

posts.cookedHtml: 13 posts were merged into an existing topic: Ability to move files

posts.author: YuvrajSingh (Yuvraj Singh Rajput)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @YossiT, you can use the Copy Files Pro app available on the monday marketplace.

Using the Copy Files Pro app, you can move files between file columns, boards, items, etc.

You can also select a monday column(text, email, etc.) and use the column value as a new name for the file, and the moved file will have the new name.

If you need any help, please schedule a call.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
YossiT:

HI All, we really need a way to move items between file columns in monday.com
for details please see here: Move files between columns

similar requests here: Ability to move files

Thank you

Hi @YossiT
This can actually be handled using Make.

With Make, you can retrieve the file from one file column and then upload it to another file column on the same item (or even a different item if needed). The automation can be triggered when a file is added or based on any other condition you define.

So while moving files between file columns isn’t currently supported natively, Make can automate the process and move the files for you without manual work.
